metadata.description: Behavioral substrate for the @enchanter-ai ecosystem — conduct-as-code, failure taxonomy, engines, recipes. Split into 7 focused plugins.

plugins.name: enchanter-core
plugins.description: Universal behavioral foundation: discipline, context, verification, delegation, tier-sizing, F01-F14 taxonomy, tool-use, doubt-engine, hooks, precedent.

plugins.name: enchanter-skills
plugins.description: Skill authoring + output formatting + 8 framework recipes (Claude Code, Cursor, OpenAI Agents, LangChain, Pydantic-AI, BAML, system-prompt, stupid-agent-review).

plugins.name: enchanter-orchestration
plugins.description: Multi-agent orchestration: task-decomposition, multi-turn-negotiation, eval-driven-self-improvement, inference-substrate + 12 algorithmic engines + shared test runner.

plugins.name: enchanter-web
plugins.description: Live web access conduct: cache, dedup, budget, cite hygiene.

plugins.name: enchanter-memory
plugins.description: Cross-session memory hygiene: working memory, decay, recall verification.

plugins.name: enchanter-cost
plugins.description: Session economics: cost-accounting, latency-budgeting, eval-harnesses recipe.

plugins.name: enchanter-safety
plugins.description: Safety + compliance + security + operator-wiring: refusal-and-recovery, F15-F21 taxonomy, FedRAMP/ISO/SOC2/NIST evidence, pentest, synthetic-fire, OTLP/PagerDuty/Sentry wiring.
